title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at HomeTown Global Group

jsonLd.title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at HomeTown Global Group
jsonLd.description:
HomeTown Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Nashik. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About HomeTown Global Group:
HomeTown Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HomeTown Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
